content.full_text:
November 16, 2006

Ron Leone
1878 Lynwood Drive
Concord, CA 91746

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-06-200

Dear Mr. Leone:

This letter is in response to your request for advice regarding the conflict-of-interest provisions of the Political Reform Act (the “Act”).1 In our telephone conversation of October 23, 2006, you stated that you had received general advice from the Concord City Attorney, and that you no longer needed us to respond at this time. Accordingly, your request for advice has been withdrawn.

If you have any other questions on this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: William J. Denkeit
Senior Counsel, Legal Division

WJL/meh
I:\AdviceLtrs\06-200

1 Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
